zh.lifeSummary: Joan Brent於1375年出生。她和John Brent至少有1個兒子。她去世於1435年享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joan Brent于1375年出生。她和John Brent至少有1个儿子。她去世于1435年享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from East Brent in Somerset or South Brent in Devon, both named from Old English brente ‘steep place’, referring to the steep hills on which they stand. Compare Brents .
History: Giles Brent came from Gloucestershire, England, to MD in 1638.

variants.name: Brunt
meanings: English (Midlands and Wales): habitational name from Brund in Staffordshire or from some other place called from a burnt clearing (Middle English brend ‘burned’). In placenames Brund- and Brunt- are to some extent interchangeable with Brent .
English: nickname from Middle English brund, brunt, brond, metathesized forms of burned, burnt ‘burnt’, perhaps with reference to branding as a punishment for a crime. Compare Brent .

variants.name: Brents
meanings: Altered form of English Brent , with the addition of excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: Joan Brent was born in 1375. She had at least 1 son with John Brent. She died in 1435, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Joan Brent est née en 1375. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec John Brent. Elle est décédée en 1435, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Joan Brent wurde 1375 geboren. Sie hatte mit John Brent mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1435 im Alter von 60 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Joan Brent è nata il nel 1375. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con John Brent. Morì nel 1435, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Brentは1375年に生まれた。彼女はJohn Brentとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1435年に60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Brent(은)는 1375년 태어났다. 그녀는 John Brent(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1435년 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Joan Brent nasceu em 1375. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com John Brent. Ela faleceu em 1435, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Joan Brent родилась в 1375 г. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от John Brent. Она умерла в 1435 г. в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Joan Brent nació en 1375. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con John Brent. Murió en 1435, a la edad de 60 años.
